narrative_summary: - User requested adding a new asset named `dwh_asset` to a Dagster project
- Read the `dg scaffold defs` reference file at `skills/dagster-expert/references/cli/scaffold/defs.md` to understand the correct scaffolding command
- Ran `uv run dg scaffold defs dagster.asset assets/dwh_asset.py` to create the asset file at `src/acme_co_dataeng/defs/assets/dwh_asset.py`
- Verified the asset was registered by running `uv run dg list defs` and confirming `dwh_asset` appeared in the output
